title: Subscription state chip
description: Colour-coded chip for one of the 9 subscription states. Consistent across every list + detail surface.

variant.$expr: ({ trialing: 'info', active: 'success', at_risk: 'warning', grace: 'warning', past_due: 'warning', unpaid: 'danger', suspended: 'danger', cancelled: 'neutral', expired: 'neutral' }[props.state] || 'neutral')

leadingIcon.$expr: ({ trialing: 'clock', active: 'check-circle', at_risk: 'exclamation-triangle', grace: 'exclamation-triangle', past_due: 'exclamation-triangle', unpaid: 'exclamation-circle', suspended: 'exclamation-circle', cancelled: 'x-circle', expired: 'x-circle' }[props.state])

children.$expr: ({ trialing: 'Trial', active: 'Active', at_risk: 'At risk', grace: 'Grace period', past_due: 'Past due', unpaid: 'Unpaid', suspended: 'Suspended', cancelled: 'Cancelled', expired: 'Expired' }[props.state] || props.state)
